indicators.name: bed
indicators.rationale: The bed is large and takes up a significant portion of the room, leaving little space for computer work.

indicators.name: floor-wood
indicators.rationale: The wooden floor provides a warm and comfortable surface to place a laptop.

indicators.name: window-blind
indicators.rationale: The window blinds allow natural light to enter, which can be beneficial for computer work.

indicators.name: ceiling-merged
indicators.rationale: The ceiling does not provide any specific features that would support or hinder computer work.

reasoning_summary: The room has a large bed that takes up much of the space, making it marginally adequate for computer work. The wooden floor and window blinds contribute positively to the environment.
